title: Askew Sweetened
description: This resource pack is basically what Minecraft: Askew (made by Krzysztof Pikes) was like, but is now even more skewed and with a sweet n' sick twist! Everything in this pack is made PURELY out of candies and sweets of all kinds!
body:
Not gonna _sugarcoat_ this description much, puns entirely intended, but this pack serves to be a sweetened variation pack to an incredible music & resource pack called Minecraft Askew, made by Krzystof Pikes. As well, in a way it's also a bit of a neat little spin on the old candy pack!

**Note: Everything still not turned into candy or sounds/music-wise were made from Krzystof Pikes. Please please please go and check out his works and support him if you can!**

**As well, currently this pack isn't finalized yet and is STILL being developed. Expect there to be oddities, WIP things, unfinished or untouched things or even weird-lookin' things whenever there's a WIP release!**

**Lastly, you WILL need Optifine for this pack! Certain things like the composter models and "fences" you'll still be able to experience relatively simply, though for certain things like randomized textures or custom entities you'll have extreme issues without it!**

**Some cool stuff we currently have!**
- 14x14 pixel, (1 instance of) 15x15 pixel, and 140x140 pixel textures!
- ENTIRELY cohesive themes and a cohesive "story" (aka, something I made up along the way quasilore-wise and yet still makes sense when you think about what it all means)
- Separate textures for fences.
- Mob models & variations! (Made by both Unknown & MaskedAbyss) :D
- Loads and loads of varied sweets. (Ofc lol)
- Custom lang (As of rn, sadly only for the english version)
- Customized Achievements.
- 5 replaced colors.
- Some goofs and concept folders I snuck into the pack. Just development images basically.
- Even this list won't do justice to saying anything I'll try adding into this pack down the line! :)

With that out of the way, seriously, have fun with this "love-letter to Askew" pack no matter at what point it's at!
